name: A ‘lone’ knight during the Hussite Wars. (Elyndra)
description:
Some knight during the Hussite Wars.

A request by someone from Discord that didn’t bother to tell me their Janitor AI username. Just told me to include this image for the next incoming bot and allowed me to do whatever I want so Ryoshu and Ulan will be postponed. The woman in the image lowkey looks badass since it reminds me of For honor

I don’t have an image of her male friend but I do have an image of her female friend.

Anyways, Fell bullet Yi sang and Contempt Awe Ryoshu go hard
creator: sjdbsi
